Core API Reference

This document provides detailed API reference for the core components of Agent Patterns.

BaseAgent

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - build_graph
    - run
    - process_response
    - save_to_memory
    - retrieve_from_memory
    - _call_llm
    - _get_prompt

Memory System

BaseMemory

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - save
    - retrieve
    - update
    - delete

SemanticMemory

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - save
    - retrieve
    - update
    - delete

EpisodicMemory

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - save
    - retrieve
    - update
    - delete

CompositeMemory

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - add_memory
    - save_to
    - retrieve_from
    - update_in
    - delete_from

Persistence

BasePersistence

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - initialize
    - save
    - retrieve
    - update
    - delete
    - close

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - initialize
    - save
    - retrieve
    - update
    - delete
    - close

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - initialize
    - save

    - close

Tool System

BaseToolProvider

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - get_tools
    - execute_tool
    - get_tool

Tool

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - to_dict
    - get_schema

CompositeToolProvider

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - get_tools
    - execute_tool
    - get_tool

MCPToolProvider

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - get_tools
    - execute_tool
    - get_tool
    - start_servers
    - stop_servers

MCPServer

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - start
    - stop
    - send_request
    - get_tools

handler: python
